sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 44:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 44:1
items.html: In Hochma of AB, the male is on the level of Hochma, and the female is on the level of Bina. In ZON of Hochma of SAG of AB, the male is on the level of Bina, extended from the coupling of ZON of Keter, and the female is the phase of record of Bina in the vessel of Hochma from the time of the first expansion. (Inner Light, Item‎ 47)
